creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
johans and I happened to notice a little bug together:
There is a discrepancy at the maximal allowed length of COMMENT according to:
*) ports-mgmt/portlint/ [1] ( 70 characters) and
*) The Porter's Handbook[2] (<60 characters).

Please do decide ;-)

Greetings,
 Kalten

[1] ports/ports-mgmt/portlint/src/portlint.pl line 2754
[2] http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/makefile-comment.html
